title: Quantum computing milestone at IBM lab
summary: IBM researchers reached a new error-correction milestone on their superconducting qubit stack.

title: AWS sofre grande queda na região us-east-1
summary: AWS registrou falha prolongada em us-east-1 afetando diversos serviços populares.

title: Rust 1.95 release notes posted
summary: Rust 1.95 ships with trait solver improvements and async closure stabilization.

title: Meta announces workforce reductions
summary: Meta disclosed a new round of layoffs affecting hardware divisions primarily.

title: SpaceX Starship completes orbital test
summary: SpaceX Starship finished a full orbital test flight with successful re-entry burn.

title: Ubuntu 26.04 LTS beta disponível
summary: Canonical publicou a beta do Ubuntu 26.04 LTS com kernel 6.12 e GNOME atualizado.
